creator: hans@nordhaug.priv.no
text:
* Edwin Groothuis <edwin@FreeBSD.org> [2011-06-21]:
> Maintainer of www/piwik,
> 
> Please note that PR ports/158084 has just been submitted.

I approve the patch. 

Please read http://piwik.org/blog/2011/06/piwik-1-5-security-advisory/
I think an entry in the VuXML file is warranted. 

security-team@FreeBSD.org cc-ed.

Regards,
Hans Nordhaug
